TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Wutai == Wutai gu icuwa i Pingtung. ala atjunangn mapuljat 304.67 km² (ma'linpan atjunang 244.47 km², ma'linaule atjunang 58.03 km²). ala caucau mapuljat 3,314 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 1,058 a daceneqlan, Rukai (98%) a maqcuwa caucau. vudai (ngadan nua rukai), i pasakacedas a viri tua qakaw tua taiwan, nua alu a 山地鄉 na qakaw. a caucau i vudai, izua tjuruvu a rukaizuku, mavan a tjaratjatuvu a qinaljan na rukai uta. avan a amin a qinaljan na rukai i nakacalisiyan na guan na qakaw. paljavak tua atjunang matja 6 qinaljan i Wutai. matja 8 qinaljan imaza, Kabalelradhane , Kinulane , Adiri , Wutai , Karamemedesane , Kudrengere , Kucapungane , Labuwan . vudai, mavaday a aicu a guciu tua unem a mula: Labuwan /Labuane, ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan i 長治鄉長治a qinaljan a百合. Kinulane: sicuayanga a ngadan avan a 去怒,去露. ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan i長治鄉長治a qinaljan a 百合. Adiri: ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan i 長治鄉長治a qinaljan a 百合. Kucapungane: ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan ta rinari i makazayazaya, sa papungadan ta古茶布安 imaza. Karamemedesane: ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan i 長治鄉長治a qinaljan a 百合. a vecekadan a kinapangaljan a paljavak na vudai a guciu, izua a djelu a qinaljan, mavan a Vudai, Kabalelradhane/Kabalelathane, Kudrengere/Ila. tatuluan izua drusa a gakku a kedrikedri imaza i vudai(wutai gu). caucau masa a vudai i gaduan, kedrikedri a cauvau imaza. avan a tjara kedri a caucau a sepaljavak i qakaw uta. ljawa, ka pinaljavak na teldreka(maolin gu) na takaw matucu, mavan a tjara kedri a caucau a guciu i taiwan. paravacan a racev , vurasi, vaqu, vaday sipacacikelan palidring a djalan sikamasan 24 a palidring a djalan na taiwan kayakay sipacacikel aicu a kayakay imaza tua vudai katua kudrengere.
S.PHON: == wutai == wutai gu iʦuwa i piŋtuŋ. aɭa aʦunaŋn mapuʎat ***.** km* (maʔɭinpan aʦunaŋ ***.** km*, maʔɭinauɭə aʦunaŋ **.** km*). aɭa ʦauʦau mapuʎat *,*** ʦauʦau, aɭa daʦənəqɭan mapuʎat *,*** a daʦənəqɭan, rukai (**%) a maqʦuwa ʦauʦau. vudai (ŋadan nua rukai), i pasakaʦədas a viri tua qakaw tua taiwan, nua aɭu a *** na qakaw. a ʦauʦau i vudai, izua ʦuruvu a rukaizuku, mavan a ʦaraʦatuvu a qinaʎan na rukai uta. avan a amin a qinaʎan na rukai i nakaʦaɭisijan na guan na qakaw. paʎavak tua aʦunaŋ maʦa * qinaʎan i wutai. maʦa * qinaʎan imaza, kabaɭəɭradhanə , kinuɭanə , adiri , wutai , karaməmədəsanə , kuɖəŋərə , kuʦapuŋanə , ɭabuwan . vudai, mavadaj a aiʦu a guʦiu tua unəm a muɭa: ɭabuwan /ɭabuanə, ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan i *****a qinaʎan a**. kinuɭanə: siʦuajaŋa a ŋadan avan a **,**. ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan i*****a qinaʎan a **. adiri: ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan i *****a qinaʎan a **. kuʦapuŋanə: ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan ta rinari i makazajazaja, sa papuŋadan ta**** imaza. karaməmədəsanə: ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan i *****a qinaʎan a **. a vəʦəkadan a kinapaŋaʎan a paʎavak na vudai a guʦiu, izua a ɉəɭu a qinaʎan, mavan a vudai, kabaɭəɭradhanə/kabaɭəɭathanə, kuɖəŋərə/iɭa. tatuɭuan izua ɖusa a gakku a kəɖikəɖi imaza i vudai(wutai gu). ʦauʦau masa a vudai i gaduan, kəɖikəɖi a ʦauvau imaza. avan a ʦara kəɖi a ʦauʦau a səpaʎavak i qakaw uta. ʎawa, ka pinaʎavak na təɭɖəka(mauɭin gu) na takaw matuʦu, mavan a ʦara kəɖi a ʦauʦau a guʦiu i taiwan. paravaʦan a raʦəv , vurasi, vaqu, vadaj sipaʦaʦikəɭan paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na taiwan kajakaj sipaʦaʦikəɭ aiʦu a kajakaj imaza tua vudai katua kuɖəŋərə.
S.FORM: == Wutai == Wutai gu icuwa i Pingtung. ala atjunangn mapuljat 304.67 km² (ma'linpan atjunang 244.47 km², ma'linaule atjunang 58.03 km²). ala caucau mapuljat 3,314 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 1,058 a daceneqlan, Rukai (98%) a maqcuwa caucau. vudai (ngadan nua rukai), i pasakacedas a viri tua qakaw tua taiwan, nua alu a 山地鄉 na qakaw. a caucau i vudai, izua tjuruvu a rukaizuku, mavan a tjaratjatuvu a qinaljan na rukai uta. avan a amin a qinaljan na rukai i nakacalisiyan na guan na qakaw. paljavak tua atjunang matja 6 qinaljan i Wutai. matja 8 qinaljan imaza, Kabalelradhane , Kinulane , Adiri , Wutai , Karamemedesane , Kudrengere , Kucapungane , Labuwan . vudai, mavaday a aicu a guciu tua unem a mula: Labuwan /Labuane, ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan i 長治鄉長治a qinaljan a百合. Kinulane: sicuayanga a ngadan avan a 去怒,去露. ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan i長治鄉長治a qinaljan a 百合. Adiri: ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan i 長治鄉長治a qinaljan a 百合. Kucapungane: ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan ta rinari i makazayazaya, sa papungadan ta古茶布安 imaza. Karamemedesane: ka secevungsevung ta 八八a raljiz, sinamazan i 長治鄉長治a qinaljan a 百合. a vecekadan a kinapangaljan a paljavak na vudai a guciu, izua a djelu a qinaljan, mavan a Vudai, Kabalelradhane/Kabalelathane, Kudrengere/Ila. tatuluan izua drusa a gakku a kedrikedri imaza i vudai(wutai gu). caucau masa a vudai i gaduan, kedrikedri a cauvau imaza. avan a tjara kedri a caucau a sepaljavak i qakaw uta. ljawa, ka pinaljavak na teldreka(maolin gu) na takaw matucu, mavan a tjara kedri a caucau a guciu i taiwan. paravacan a racev , vurasi, vaqu, vaday sipacacikelan palidring a djalan sikamasan 24 a palidring a djalan na taiwan kayakay sipacacikel aicu a kayakay imaza tua vudai katua kudrengere.
S.PHON: == wutai == wutai gu iʦuwa i piŋtuŋ. aɭa aʦunaŋn mapuʎat ***.** km* (maʔɭinpan aʦunaŋ ***.** km*, maʔɭinauɭə aʦunaŋ **.** km*). aɭa ʦauʦau mapuʎat *,*** ʦauʦau, aɭa daʦənəqɭan mapuʎat *,*** a daʦənəqɭan, rukai (**%) a maqʦuwa ʦauʦau. vudai (ŋadan nua rukai), i pasakaʦədas a viri tua qakaw tua taiwan, nua aɭu a *** na qakaw. a ʦauʦau i vudai, izua ʦuruvu a rukaizuku, mavan a ʦaraʦatuvu a qinaʎan na rukai uta. avan a amin a qinaʎan na rukai i nakaʦaɭisijan na guan na qakaw. paʎavak tua aʦunaŋ maʦa * qinaʎan i wutai. maʦa * qinaʎan imaza, kabaɭəɭradhanə , kinuɭanə , adiri , wutai , karaməmədəsanə , kuɖəŋərə , kuʦapuŋanə , ɭabuwan . vudai, mavadaj a aiʦu a guʦiu tua unəm a muɭa: ɭabuwan /ɭabuanə, ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan i *****a qinaʎan a**. kinuɭanə: siʦuajaŋa a ŋadan avan a **,**. ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan i*****a qinaʎan a **. adiri: ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan i *****a qinaʎan a **. kuʦapuŋanə: ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan ta rinari i makazajazaja, sa papuŋadan ta**** imaza. karaməmədəsanə: ka səʦəvuŋsəvuŋ ta **a raʎiz, sinamazan i *****a qinaʎan a **. a vəʦəkadan a kinapaŋaʎan a paʎavak na vudai a guʦiu, izua a ɉəɭu a qinaʎan, mavan a vudai, kabaɭəɭradhanə/kabaɭəɭathanə, kuɖəŋərə/iɭa. tatuɭuan izua ɖusa a gakku a kəɖikəɖi imaza i vudai(wutai gu). ʦauʦau masa a vudai i gaduan, kəɖikəɖi a ʦauvau imaza. avan a ʦara kəɖi a ʦauʦau a səpaʎavak i qakaw uta. ʎawa, ka pinaʎavak na təɭɖəka(mauɭin gu) na takaw matuʦu, mavan a ʦara kəɖi a ʦauʦau a guʦiu i taiwan. paravaʦan a raʦəv , vurasi, vaqu, vadaj sipaʦaʦikəɭan paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan sikamasan ** a paɭiɖiŋ a ɉaɭan na taiwan kajakaj sipaʦaʦikəɭ aiʦu a kajakaj imaza tua vudai katua kuɖəŋərə.
